post.title: Research Software Engineer
post.job_description: We need a Research Software Engineer to support scientists and engineers with Python packages, reproducible workflows, HPC job execution, automation, validation, documentation, and maintainable research code. The role involves working with domain experts, improving simulation/data pipelines, and creating tools that make computational research easier to repeat and review.

core_skills.skills_list: Python, packaging, pytest, type hints, CLI tools, pandas, NumPy, logging
Numerical workflows, data processing, simulation outputs, reproducible analysis
Batch jobs, scheduler workflows, cluster runs, restartable campaigns, job logs
Shell workflows, filesystem conventions, environment setup, debugging
Python/Bash automation, batch execution, report generation, workflow orchestration
Versioned inputs, deterministic outputs, validation checks, documented assumptions
User guides, developer notes, research handoff docs, examples, tutorials

bullets.description: Packaged research code for reuse across multiple scientific teams.
Added pytest validation suites for numerical workflows and data-processing utilities.
Refactored notebook-heavy workflows into tested Python modules.
Automated cluster batch runs for parameter studies and long-running simulations.
Standardized simulation outputs, logs, and report-ready artifacts.
Debugged failed cluster runs using logs, job metadata, and reproducible test cases.
Taught reproducible Python workflows for scientific computing projects.
Created research-code exercises covering testing, packaging, and documentation.

selected_projects.label: Climate Sim Pipeline
selected_projects.description: Python workflow for running climate simulations, managing input decks, submitting HPC jobs, and collecting outputs.

selected_projects.label: Research Plotting Toolkit
selected_projects.description: Reusable plotting and reporting package for research datasets, validation figures, and publication-ready outputs.
